about.heading: About VIZIA Technologies
about.lead: A security-first software engineering company delivering production-ready systems across web, mobile, AI, and infrastructure.

cards.title: Who We Are
cards.content:
VIZIA Technologies is a software engineering company focused on building secure, scalable, and maintainable systems for enterprises and startups.

We combine engineering rigour with practical delivery — shipping production systems with clear documentation, governance, and measurable outcomes.

cards.title: Our Approach
items: Threat modelling at the design stage

cards.title: Our Mission
cards.content: To make enterprise-grade engineering accessible to organisations of all sizes — without compromising on security, reliability, or delivery speed.

services_page.heading: Our Services
services_page.lead: Security-first engineering services across web, mobile, AI, infrastructure, and cyber security.

items.name: Web Development
items.summary: Full-stack web applications built with Next.js, React, and Node.js — secure, performant, and SEO-ready.
items.full_description: We build high-performance, SEO-ready web applications using a security-by-design approach. Every application is developed with OWASP-aligned controls, input validation, and least-privilege access patterns built in from the start — not bolted on at the end.
benefits: 90+ Lighthouse-ready foundations (performance, SEO, accessibility)
Secure architecture aligned to OWASP Top 10
Scalable codebase and clear delivery milestones

items.name: Mobile Development
items.summary: Cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android with React Native — built for reliability and security.
items.full_description: We deliver reliable mobile experiences with secure APIs and production-grade release practices. Our mobile-first planning covers API contract design, JWT-based auth with robust session policies, and observability-ready backend patterns for faster incident response.
benefits: Fewer production defects via validated inputs and stable APIs
Stronger security posture for customer data
Clear rollout plan and maintenance strategy
case_examples: Mobile-first product scoping and API contract design
Secure auth and offline data handling

items.name: Cyber Security
items.summary: Penetration testing, threat modelling, OWASP-aligned reviews, and 24/7 incident response.
items.full_description: We provide OWASP-aligned security controls, penetration testing, and infrastructure hardening for applications and networks. Our security reviews identify vulnerabilities before they reach production, and our incident response plans ensure you can recover quickly when things go wrong.
benefits: Reduced attack surface across web, API, and network layers
Clear risk register and remediation roadmap
Compliance-ready documentation and audit trails
case_examples: Web application penetration test and OWASP Top 10 review
Incident response plan and runbook development

items.name: Artificial Intelligence
items.summary: Applied ML, NLP pipelines, and intelligent automation designed for measurable business outcomes.
items.full_description: We build applied AI and machine learning systems focused on measurable outcomes and safe data boundaries. From NLP pipelines to predictive models, every system is built with observability, explainability, and production reliability in mind.
benefits: Automatable decisions backed by data, not guesswork
Safe data boundaries and explainable outputs
Measurable ROI with clear evaluation metrics

items.name: Data Engineering
items.summary: Data pipelines, warehouses, and analytics platforms built for scale and compliance.
items.full_description: We design and build data pipelines, warehouses, and analytics platforms that handle scale without sacrificing compliance or data integrity. Our data engineering solutions are built for reliability, with clear lineage, monitoring, and governance from day one.
benefits: Reliable data pipelines with clear lineage and monitoring
Compliance-ready data governance and access controls
Analytics-ready data models for faster business decisions

items.name: Network Engineering
items.summary: Enterprise network infrastructure, VPNs, and secure connectivity solutions.
items.full_description: We design and deploy enterprise network infrastructure built for reliability, security, and scale. From VPN configuration and firewall hardening to network segmentation and monitoring, our solutions are built to meet enterprise and regulatory requirements.
benefits: Reduced network attack surface through segmentation and hardening
High availability and fault-tolerant connectivity
Clear network documentation and change management

items.name: Cloud Infrastructure
items.summary: Cloud architecture, DevOps pipelines, and infrastructure hardening on AWS, GCP, and Azure.
items.full_description: We design cloud infrastructure that is secure, cost-efficient, and built for production from day one. Our DevOps pipelines automate testing, deployment, and monitoring so your team can ship faster without sacrificing reliability or security compliance.
benefits: Infrastructure as code for repeatable, auditable deployments
Reduced downtime with automated rollbacks and health checks
Security hardening aligned to cloud provider best practices

items.name: IoT Solutions
items.summary: Connected device ecosystems, IoT firmware, and real-time data collection platforms.
items.full_description: We build connected device ecosystems that collect, transmit, and act on real-time data securely. From firmware development to cloud integration and dashboards, our IoT solutions are designed for reliability in demanding environments.
benefits: Secure device communication with encryption and authentication
Real-time data collection and alerting
Scalable platform that grows with your device fleet

items.name: Smart CCTV
items.summary: AI-powered surveillance systems with real-time analytics, alerts, and remote management.
items.full_description: We design and deploy AI-powered CCTV systems that go beyond recording. Our solutions include real-time object detection, motion analytics, automated alerts, and remote management dashboards — all built with privacy and compliance considerations.
benefits: Real-time threat detection and automated alerts
Reduced manual monitoring overhead
Privacy-compliant storage and access controls
case_examples: Multi-site CCTV system with AI analytics
Remote monitoring dashboard for security teams

items.name: Automation
items.summary: Business process automation, RPA, and workflow orchestration to reduce manual overhead.
items.full_description: We automate repetitive business processes so your team can focus on work that matters. From RPA bots to workflow orchestration and API integrations, our automation solutions are built to be maintainable, monitored, and auditable.
benefits: Reduced manual overhead and human error
Faster turnaround on routine business operations
Auditable automation with logging and alerting

items.name: UI/UX Design
items.summary: User research, wireframing, and high-fidelity design for web and mobile products.
items.full_description: We design interfaces that are clear, accessible, and built around how your users actually work. Our process covers user research, wireframing, prototyping, and high-fidelity design — all aligned to your brand and engineering constraints.
benefits: Reduced development rework through validated designs
Accessible interfaces that meet WCAG standards
Design system that scales across your product

items.name: IT Consulting
items.summary: Strategic technology advisory, architecture reviews, and digital transformation planning.
items.full_description: We help organisations make better technology decisions — whether that's evaluating a new platform, reviewing an existing architecture, or planning a digital transformation. Our advisory work is practical, vendor-neutral, and grounded in real engineering experience.
benefits: Clear technology strategy aligned to business goals
Reduced risk from poor vendor or architecture choices
Practical roadmap with prioritised, costed initiatives
